questions.question: Given a dataset of exam scores with mean 85 and standard deviation 10, calculate the sample mean for a new student with a score of 90. (5 marks)
A random sample of exam scores with mean 90 and standard deviation 5 is taken. Calculate the sample mean for the population from which the sample was drawn. (10 marks)
A dataset of exam scores has a sample mean of 80 and a population standard deviation of 12. Calculate the sample mean for the population if the sample size is 25. (15 marks)
